---
title: "Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects — Hugo Trad"
description: "The Sludge Audit Platform — a tool for auditing administrative complexity."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/projects">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/projets">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/projects">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="../en/projects.html" class="is-active">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/projets.html">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/projects.html">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--inner">
  <header class="site-header">
    <a href="index.html" class="site-header__brand">Hugo Trad</a>
    <nav class="site-header__nav">
      <a href="research.html">Research</a>
      <a href="projects.html" class="is-active">Projects</a>
      <a href="teaching.html">Teaching</a>
      <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <article class="inner">
    <h1 class="inner__title">Projects</h1>
    <p class="inner__lede">A platform that translates the research into a practical tool for organisations and governments.</p>

    <article class="project-card">
      <h2 class="project-card__title">Sludge Audit Platform <span class="badge-status">in development</span></h2>
      <p class="project-card__tagline">A digital platform that helps organisations detect and reduce administrative complexity.</p>
      <p class="project-card__links">
        <a href="mailto:hugo.trad@um6p.ma?subject=Sludge%20Audit%20Platform">Interested? Contact me for access or to share feedback</a>
      </p>
    </article>
  </article>
</main>
```
